data.title: Encore Search Partners named #1 executive search firm by Houston Business Journal after year of record performance.
data.description: In Houston, as of January 14, 2026, Encore Search Partners has achieved the top position according to the Houston Business Journal. This ranking was secured after a successful year of outstanding performance, supported by substantial investments in individuals, procedures, and technology. The recognition is awarded to executive search firms based on various criteria.

data.title: FiscalNote completes migration of customers to PolicyNote from legacy platform, a significant achievement.
data.description: In Washington, FiscalNote has reached a significant achievement with PolicyNote by successfully migrating all customers from the older FiscalNote platform. This marks a major milestone for the company as it transitions its customers to the new platform for policy-related services and solutions.

data.title: Subscriptions are evolving as consumers now manage them actively, as per Recurly's 2026 report, making business models stronger.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, Recurly, a prominent subscription growth platform, has unveiled the 2026 State of Subscriptions report. The report highlights a significant shift in consumer behavior towards subscription services, indicating a positive impact on the business model. Consumers are now actively managing their subscriptions, pausing them when necessary, cancelling if the value diminishes, and re-subscribing when the service aligns with their needs. This shift reflects a more engaged approach by consumers towards subscriptions rather than viewing them as fixed expenses.

data.title: Affirm updates underwriting with real-time finances, using richer signals like account balances. More informed decisions at checkout.
data.description: In San Francisco, the financial services company Affirm (NASDAQ: AFRM) is implementing changes in its underwriting process to adapt to the fast-paced nature of real life. Expanding on its previous strategy of evaluating each transaction individually, Affirm's updated underwriting now integrates more dynamic real-time data such as account balances and cash flow patterns. By leveraging these additional insights, Affirm gains a more precise and up-to-date understanding of a customer's financial position during the purchase process, ultimately resulting in more informed decisions.

data.title: Entegris (Nasdaq: ENTG) declares $0.10/share quarterly dividend to be paid on Feb 18, 2026, to shareholders on record by Jan 28, 2026.
data.description: Entegris, Inc., a prominent provider of crucial advanced materials and process solutions for the semiconductor and high-technology sectors, declared that its board of directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.10 per share. The dividend will be disbursed on February 18, 2026, to shareholders on record as of January 28, 2026. Entegris is recognized for its essential contributions to these industries, enhancing operations and materials reliability.

data.title: Silver Storm begins 6,000m drilling at La Parrilla Silver Mine, 76km from Durango, Mexico; President notes excitement.
data.description: In Toronto, Silver Storm Mining Ltd. has started underground drilling at its La Parrilla Silver Mine Complex in Mexico. The mine, located 76 kilometers southeast of Durango, is 100% owned by the company. The President and CEO, Greg McKenzie, expressed enthusiasm for the project, stating that the team is excited to resume drilling at La Parrilla. The drilling is part of the initial phase and aims to support the current operations. Silver Storm is listed on the TSX.V under the symbol SVRS, on the OTC market as SVRSF, and on the FSE as SVR.

data.title: NUBURU partners with Tekne, invests €13m convertible loan, and acquires 2.9% equity stake, advancing global defense platform.
data.description: In Denver, NUBURU, Inc. (NYSE American: BURU), a leader in high-performance blue laser technology, has revealed a major development in its collaboration with Tekne S.p.A. Through Nuburu Defense LLC, the company has finalized a Network Contract with Tekne, along with a €13m convertible loan from shareholders and a 2.9% equity investment in Tekne. This move signifies a significant step forward in their partnership.

data.title: Base Power appoints Zina Bash as Chief Legal Officer and Travis Kavulla as Head of Policy as they expand after securing $1 billion in Series C financing, focusing on distributed energy storage.
data.description: A company named Base Power, based in Austin, Texas, is revolutionizing the grid by utilizing distributed energy storage to provide dependable and cost-effective electricity. In order to expand across the country, Base is proactively investing in legal and policy expertise to effectively navigate regulation, market structure, and grid dependability. After securing a substantial $1 billion in Series C funding in October, Base is structuring a top-tier legal and policy team to align with its extensive goals.

data.title: PPC appoints Ted Buell as Chief Digital Officer, bringing more than 25 years of experience in driving digital growth.
data.description: In Chicago, PPC, a renowned family investment firm specializing in collaborating with family, founder, and management-owned enterprises, revealed the appointment of Ted Buell as Senior Director and Chief Digital Officer. With over 25 years in the field, Buell has extensive experience in aiding companies to enhance growth via digital transformation and growth marketing strategies. In his new position, he will collaborate with PPC's group of companies to evaluate, devise, and oversee intricate business metamorphoses.

data.title: Thunderstruck Ag adds Rezidue Reaper from Sharp Harvest to their product line, one-pass harvest tool for managing crop residue.
data.description: In Los Angeles, Thunderstruck Ag, a leading global supplier of farmer-focused equipment solutions, unveiled the latest addition to its array of innovative farming equipment. The Rezidue Reaper by Sharp Harvest is now part of their expanding collection of farmer-created, field-proven equipment solutions. This new addition is tailored to effectively handle and control dense crop residue during harvest, aiding farmers in preparing their fields more effectively and cutting down on the requirement for extra tillage rounds. Specifically designed for row-crop farmers, the Rezidue Reaper offers a practical solution for managing heavy crop leftovers during harvest.

A train derailed in northeastern Thailand after a construction crane fell on three of its carriages, killing at least 25 people and injuring about 80. The accident took place on Wednesday morning in the Sikhio district of Nakhon Ratchasima province, on a train from the capital

data.title: TotalEnergies (NYSE: TTE) forms 50/50 JV in Bahrain with Bapco Energies, sells Nigeria assets. Enhances Middle East presence.
data.description: TotalEnergies SE (NYSE: TTE) recently unveiled two significant partnerships in the Middle East and West Africa. The company collaborated with Bapco Energies to introduce a 50/50 trading joint venture named BxT Trading. This venture, supported by flows from Bapco Energies' refinery in Bahrain, aims to boost Bahrain's oil industry by maximizing value and increasing access to global markets. BxT Trading will serve as a new competitive player in the Middle East and will complement TotalEnergies' existing trading hubs in Houston, Geneva, and Singapore, allowing for better responsiveness to market demands in the region.

data.title: OTC Markets Group welcomes Cannara Biotech Inc. to OTCQX, trading on OTCQX Best Market as LOVFF, FSX: 8CB.
data.description: On January 14, 2026, OTC Markets Group Inc. disclosed that Cannara Biotech Inc. (TSX-V: LOVE.V; OTCQX: LOVFF FSX: 8CB) has met the requirements to trade on the OTCQX® Best Market. OTC Markets Group Inc. oversees regulated trading markets for 12,000 U.S. and international securities. Cannara Biotech Inc., a company that specializes in producing high-quality cannabis and cannabis-derived products, transitioned to the OTCQX from the OTCQB® Venture Market.

data.title: $5 Tuesdays at Cineplex until Feb 24: $5 movie tickets and $5 small popcorn at all theatres across the country.
data.description: Starting on January 20th until February 24th, Cineplex is reintroducing the popular $5 Tuesdays promotion at theaters across the country. During this six-week period, movie enthusiasts can enjoy $5 movie tickets and purchase small popcorn for only $5. This limited-time offer provides an affordable and enjoyable experience for cinema-goers.

data.title: C4 Therapeutics to advance cemsidomide as best-in-class IKZF1/3 degrader. Phase 2 trial to begin Q1 2026 with recommended dose of 100 µg.
data.description: The Cemsidomide Phase 2 MOMENTUM trial is set to begin in the first quarter of 2026. The recommended dose for this phase is 100 micrograms.

data.title: Lithium Ionic Corp reviews 2025 achievements, aims to build in Brazil's Lithium Valley in 2026. TSXV: LTH; OTCQX: LTHCF; FSE: H3N.
data.description: Lithium Ionic Corp. (TSXV: LTH; OTCQX: LTHCF; FSE: H3N) based in Toronto, released a statement on Jan. 14, 2026, summarizing its achievements in 2025 and outlining objectives for 2026. The company highlighted its key milestones in the past year and outlined strategic priorities for the upcoming year. As a leading player in the industry, Lithium Ionic Corp. aims to build on its successes and drive further growth in 2026. Stock market symbols include TSXV: LTH, OTCQX: LTHCF, and FSE: H3N.

data.title: Lightbridge (Nasdaq: LTBR) to attend investor conferences and events. No specific numbers mentioned.
data.description: On January 14, 2026, in Reston, Virginia, Lightbridge Corporation, a company specializing in advanced nuclear fuel technology (Nasdaq: LTBR), disclosed their participation in upcoming investor conferences and events through a press release. The management team of Lightbridge Corporation will be taking part in these events.

data.title: Eos Energy introduces Indensity battery storage system, join launch event 8:30 a.m. ET today. Register to experience future.
data.description: Today in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania, Eos Energy Enterprises, Inc. (NASDAQ: EOSE), a prominent energy company specializing in zinc-based battery energy storage systems, revealed the debut of Eos Indensity™. Interested individuals can attend the unveiling event, commencing at 8:30 a.m. ET, to witness this groundbreaking innovation firsthand. This new venture marks Eos' commitment to advancing in the energy sector and invites participants to join in shaping the future of energy storage by registering for the event.

data.title: Westhaven Gold Corp. releases special meeting materials for Feb 17, 2026, circulated to shareholders of record by Dec 30, 2025.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on January 14, 2026, Westhaven Gold Corp. (TSX-V: WHN) has released information regarding the upcoming special meeting of shareholders scheduled for February 17, 2026. The company has mailed materials, including a Management Information Circular, to Westhaven Shareholders recorded as of December 30, 2025. These documents have been deposited under the Company’s profile on Sedar+ website (www.sedarplus.ca).

data.title: Bitfarms appoints Edie Hofmeister as Chair, succeeding Brian Howlett, with Howlett staying on the board amid U.S. redomiciliation.
data.description: Edie Hofmeister will be assuming the role of Chair, taking over from Brian Howlett. Howlett will continue to serve on the board. This transition marks a significant change in leadership within the organization. Hofmeister's appointment comes as Howlett steps down from his position after a successful tenure. The move is part of a strategic shift in the company's governance. With this change, the board will benefit from Hofmeister's expertise and vision, while still retaining Howlett's valuable insights. The decision reflects the company's commitment to ensuring a smooth transition in leadership. Hofmeister's new role as Chair signifies a new chapter for the organization, as it enters a transformative phase. Howlett's continued presence on the board will provide continuity and stability during this transition period. The shift in leadership is aimed at enhancing the company's strategic direction and overall performance. Hofmeister's appointment brings a fresh perspective to the board, signaling a forward-looking approach to guiding the organization. The board expresses gratitude to Howlett for his contributions as Chair and looks forward to his continued involvement in shaping the company's future. This change highlights the company's dedication to effective leadership and governance, setting the stage for future growth and success.
